title: UltimaCraft
description: Vanilla friendly improvements. Optifine features support
body:
![](https://i.ibb.co/48B0XkC/ultimacraft.jpg)  

# UltimaCraft  

*UltimaCraft* - is a vanilla styled resource pack, designed to enhance the overall look and feel of Minecraft by adding new textures, animations, and other visual effects.  

## Features

Vanilla:
- custom block models (doors, trapdoors etc.)
- random block variations
- texture fixes and tweaks
- item animations

Optifine:
- connected textures
- biome depended textures
- environment improvements
- GUI tweaks
